partySize.title: Select Party Size
partySize.subtitle: While the kitchen gets ready for something delicious, pick the bowl that matches your group.

shoyu.name: Shoyu Ramen
shoyu.description: Soy-based broth with a balanced savory taste.

miso.name: Miso Ramen
miso.description: Hearty miso broth with deep umami flavor.

chashu.name: Chashu Chicken Ramen
chashu.description: Slices of fatty chicken roasted or braised until tender.

shio.name: Shio Ramen
shio.description: Salt-seasoned, light and clear broth with a refreshing taste.

kare.name: Kare Burosu Ramen
kare.description: Spicy curried broth with vegetables, tofu, mushrooms, and herbs.
